mapper.select:
select ifnull(sum(a.cnt), 0) / nullif(sum(s.max_count), 0) as occupancy_rate from schedule s left join ( select schedule_id, count(*) as cnt from appointment where status in (1, 2) group by schedule_id ) a on s.id = a.schedule_id where s.doctor_id = #{doctorId}
and weekday(s.schedule_date) = (#{dayOfWeek} - 1) and s.schedule_date between date_sub(#{targetDate}, interval 4 week) and date_sub(#{targetDate}, interval 1 day)
